# SideGuard

> Vibe Coding Security Tool — local MCP guard and human-in-the-loop approval for Cursor & Claude Code.

SideGuard is **not** an MCP antivirus or malware scanner. It is an **MCP guard**: it intercepts shell commands and MCP tool calls, applies your YAML policy, and waits for you to approve or deny—fail-closed by design.

## What people search for

- MCP guard / MCP guards for Cursor and Claude Code
- MCP security and MCP tool approval (not passive MCP antivirus scanning)
- Vibe coding security tools and vibe coding tips for safer AI-assisted development
- Fail-closed Cursor hooks, Claude Code security, local AI agent approval
- Prompt injection in issues and repos—blocking exfiltration commands before they run

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://sideguard.io/setup.sh | sh
sideguard install
```
